contracts_touched.description: v1.5: static extraction of contracts + selectors the strategy will touch (regex-derived, cached at register time). Shape: `{ "0xCONTRACT": ["selector", ...], "_extraction": "complete"|"incomplete", "_warnings": [...] }`.

deleted_at.description: Surfaced when the existing row is soft-deleted (Pitfall 9).

lineage_id.description: v1.8: stable lineage identifier — preserved across re-registrations of the same name.

policy_alignment.description: v1.5: derived alignment between contracts_touched and the active policy. Verdict ∈ satisfied | partial | missing | incomplete. Always recomputed against the live policy — not cached.

replaced_version.description: v1.8: details about the version this register superseded. Present only when register replaced an existing active row of the same name.

version.description: v1.8: 1-based version of this row within its lineage. 1 = first register, 2 = second iteration, ...

ReplacedVersionInfo.description: v1.8: details of the version a register call superseded.

previous_actions_changed.description:
v1.10: whether the bundle's `actions` map changed across the bump.
True iff the previous and current rows have different canonical
`actions_json`. False on legacy bundles that never used actions.

previous_id.description: `strategy_id` of the row that was just soft-deleted.

previous_version.description: 1-based version of the row that was just superseded.
